backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Project, Asset, User, Task, Collection, Token, etc.) and their in-memory Maps, plus CRUD operations with authorization via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix applied to TaskDialog.tsx to replace empty-string Select.Item values with a 'none' sentinel and update form submission logic accordingly.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and styles for the asset/token management platform.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Asset and Token Management Platform' and mounting the app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Projects, Assets, Tasks, Collections, Tokens, and Files pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AssetDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component for creating or editing an asset, with controlled name and description fields, loading state, and form submission.
frontend/src/components/CollectionDialog: Modal dialog for creating or editing a collection, featuring name/description inputs and a scrollable checkbox list for selecting assets by project.
frontend/src/components/FileMetadataDial: A dialog component for recording file metadata (filename, MIME type, size, hash) without uploading the actual file, with form validation and loading state support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the current year, app name, and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header component with app branding, theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout controls showing a truncated principal when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: A card component displaying a project's name, description, and asset count, with navigation buttons for Assets, Tasks, Collections, Tokens, and Files, plus optional edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDialog.ts: A dialog form for creating or editing a project with name and description fields, supporting loading state and pre-population when editing.
frontend/src/components/TaskDialog.tsx: A dialog form for creating or editing a task with fields for name, description, status, linked asset, and assignee, fetching available assets for the given project.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying sun/moon icons with CSS transitions.
frontend/src/components/TokenDialog.tsx: A dialog form for minting a new token with name and description fields, restricted to admins and supporting a loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations (projects, assets, tasks, collections, tokens, file metadata, and user roles) using an actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AssetsPage.tsx: Page component for listing, creating, editing, and deleting assets within a specific project, with role-based mutation access control.
frontend/src/pages/CollectionsPage.tsx: Page component for managing collections (groups of assets) within a project, supporting create, update, and delete operations with role-based access.
frontend/src/pages/FileMetadataPage.tsx: Page component that displays a table of file metadata records for a project and allows uploading or deleting file metadata entries with role-based access.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx: Main projects listing page that displays all projects in a grid, supports create/edit/delete via a dialog, and shows per-project asset counts. Access to mutate actions is gated by the user's role (admin or user).
frontend/src/pages/TasksPage.tsx: Tasks listing page scoped to a specific project (via URL param), supporting create/edit/delete of tasks with status badges and assignee info. Mutation actions are restricted to admin and user roles.
frontend/src/pages/TokensPage.tsx: Tokens listing page scoped to a project, displaying minted tokens with metadata and a mint-token dialog restricted to admin users only. Shows an informational alert for non-admin roles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording completed backend and frontend steps, architectural decisions, known issues (e.g., Select.Item empty value bug in Task dialog), and existing feature inventory at version 13.
